data.name: Hentai Archer
data.detailed_description:
Step into a tranquil, sun-lit forest where a breathtaking elven archer awaits — graceful, dangerous, and willing to reveal far more than her skills with a bow. Hentai Archer is an erotic puzzle game where each completed challenge uncovers intimate and seductive artwork of a stunning elf huntress.


Soft nature ambience, sensual illustrations, and relaxing puzzle mechanics blend into a soothing, addictive experience that feels both magical and erotic.

Game Features:

1. Erotic Elf Illustrations

Unlock steamy artwork featuring the elven archer in provocative poses, forest hideouts, and adventurous woodland scenarios.
With every puzzle solved, you reveal more of her curves, expressions, and irresistible charm.

2. Three Puzzle Modes

• 15-Puzzle (Sliding Puzzle) – A classic challenge with a sensual twist.
• Swipe Puzzle – Drag, swap, and piece together the elf beauty.
• Rotate Puzzle – Turn each tile to reveal her most tempting moments.

3. Two Difficulty Levels

• 3×3 – Quick and satisfying reveals.
• 4×4 – More challenge, more teasing, and greater reward.

4. Forest Atmosphere & Music

Immersive woodland ambience and soft fantasy melodies enhance the sensual mood and pull you into the elf’s quiet, intimate world.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 10100F/AMD Ruzen 3 3100
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1060/RX 480
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
